meaning: n.水族馆管理人,水族养殖业余爱好者
examples: Why not let the aquarist breed their own?
She discusses not needing test kits, water changes, pruning often, dosing, work that most aquarist do not care for.
Fascinating for both the novice and advanced aquarist, these brightly colored fish are active, yet peaceful inhabitants of the upper water layer of the aquarium.
